title: Seborrheic Dermatitis and Dandruff Relief: 11 Herbal Tinctures to Consider
description: Aloe barbadensis tinctures have been traditionally used to help alleviate dandruff. The gel of the Aloe barbadensis plant contains properties like vitamins A, C, and E, as well as minerals like calcium and potassium, that help soothe and calm the scalp. The constituents in the tincture, including salicylic acid and glycoproteins, have anti-inflammatory and antifungal properties that help reduce flaking and itching associated with dandruff. To use Aloe barbadensis tinctures for dandruff...
